thread.title: North Dakota could earn an extra $30M over 12 months with changes to Legacy Fund investments | News Monitor | wahpetondailynews.com
thread.title_full: North Dakota could earn an extra $30M over 12 months with changes to Legacy Fund investments | News Monitor | wahpetondailynews.com

author: Mary Steurer, NORTH DAKOTA MONITOR
title: North Dakota could earn an extra $30M over 12 months with changes to Legacy Fund investments | News Monitor | wahpetondailynews.com
text:
North Dakota has a chance to make more money off its investments after voters narrowly approved a ballot measure last week that limits spending of the state’s largest trust fund.
The Legacy Fund was created through a constitutional amendment in 2010. It’s meant to be a source of perpetual revenue for the state, and is supported by oil taxes. As of the end of August, the fund’s value was about $11.4 billion.
